name: vibrato-pgos
description: Procedural Generation Orchestration Service (PGOS) — Railway-first Godot asset orchestration (MCP name: Vibrato)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vibrato/shared && npm run build -w @vibrato/orchestrator && npm run build -w @vibrato/dashboard && npm run build -w @vibrato/sandbox-service && npm run build -w @vibrato/mcp-server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @vibrato/shared && npm run test -w @vibrato/orchestrator && npm run test -w @vibrato/mcp-server && npm run test -w @vibrato/sandbox-service && npm run test -w @vibrato/dashboard
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @vibrato/shared && npm run typecheck -w @vibrato/orchestrator && npm run typecheck -w @vibrato/dashboard && npm run typecheck -w @vibrato/sandbox-service && npm run typecheck -w @vibrato/mcp-server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @vibrato/shared && npm run lint -w @vibrato/orchestrator && npm run lint -w @vibrato/dashboard && npm run lint -w @vibrato/sandbox-service && npm run lint -w @vibrato/mcp-server
